inline_comments.message:
I don't want to see this merged ONLY because pom.xml is a derived artifact in this project (from project.clj), so the changes will be clobbered by the next PR.

That said, the changes look worthwhile.  I'm going to try and make the appropriate edits to project.clj to achieve the effect shown here, and will push up a subsequent PR intended to replace this one, if that's okay.  Alternatively, let me know if it's possible to update someone else's PR - I don't think it is.

(TLDR; -1, but with the hope that imitation is the sincerest form of flattery.)
